name: LLM Council — Multi-Model Deliberation System
description: A 3-stage pharmaceutical deliberation engine where multiple LLMs collaboratively answer user questions through parallel response generation, anonymized peer review with RAGAS-aligned grounding metrics, and chairman synthesis. Post-pipeline, a team of 9 specialist agents (expandable to 12 in value-proposition mode) analyse the output for research depth, factual grounding, risk signals, patterns, insights, quality, citation integrity, skill pipeline health, and memory orchestration.

httpAuthSecurityScheme.description: Bayer myGenAssist API key via Bearer token

skills.name: Council Deliberation Pipeline
skills.description: End-to-end 3-stage deliberation: Stage 1 (parallel LLM responses), Stage 2 (anonymized peer review with claim-level grounding), Stage 3 (chairman synthesis). Returns structured output with grounding scores, aggregate rankings, and evidence bundles.
examples: What is the mechanism of action of tafamidis for ATTR-CM?
Compare the safety profiles of DOACs vs warfarin in atrial fibrillation
Summarize Phase III clinical trial results for pembrolizumab in NSCLC

skills.name: Agent Team Post-Pipeline Analysis
skills.description: Runs 9 specialist agents in parallel after the council pipeline to provide multi-dimensional analysis: research depth, fact-checking, risk assessment, pattern detection, insight synthesis, quality auditing, citation supervision, skill pipeline health monitoring, and memory orchestration.
examples: Analyse the council output for safety signals and hallucination risk
Audit response quality, completeness, and cost-effectiveness

skills.name: Value Proposition Specialist Analysis
skills.description: Activates 3 additional VP-specialist agents (Market Positioning, Clinical Value, Messaging Strategist) when the query involves competitive differentiation, positioning, or messaging strategy. Auto-detected from query keywords.
examples: Create a value proposition for tafamidis targeting cardiologists
Develop a competitive positioning framework for our ATTR-CM treatment vs standard of care

skills.name: Context Awareness & Catastrophic Forgetting Detection
skills.description: Detects catastrophic forgetting by running adversarial self-review probes. Measures whether models can recognise their own claims when anonymized and paragraph-shuffled. Produces stability scores, adversarial deltas, and combined CA metrics.

skills.name: Evidence Retrieval Skills
skills.description: Multi-source evidence retrieval via 22 parallel skills (11 core: OpenFDA, ClinicalTrials.gov, PubMed, EMA, WHO ATC, UniProt, ChEMBL, KEGG, Reactome, RxNorm, STRING-DB + 11 web: Semantic Scholar, CrossRef, Europe PMC, DuckDuckGo Science, arXiv, Google Patents, Wikipedia, ORCID, OpenAlex, Unpaywall, Elsevier/Scopus). Citations are integrated into the chairman synthesis with inline tags.
